args: _P="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}"; if [ -z "$_P" ]; then for _D in "$HOME/.claude/plugins/GunjanGrunge/tylor" "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/GunjanGrunge/tylor/"[0-9]*/ "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/gunjangrunge/tylor/"[0-9]*/; do [ -f "$_D/server/main.py" ] && { _P="$_D"; break; }; done; fi; [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo 'Tylor: plugin root not found' >&2; exit 1; }; _VENV="$HOME/.tylor/venv"; if [ ! -f "$_VENV/bin/python3" ] && [ ! -f "$_VENV/Scripts/python3.exe" ] && [ ! -f "$_VENV/Scripts/python.exe" ]; then python3 -m venv "$_VENV" && "$_VENV/bin/pip" install -q -r "$_P/server/requirements.txt" 2>&1 | tail -2; fi; _PY="$_VENV/bin/python3"; [ -f "$_PY" ] || _PY="$_VENV/Scripts/python3.exe"; [ -f "$_PY" ] || _PY="$_VENV/Scripts/python.exe"; cd "$_P" && exec "$_PY" -m server.main
